---
title: "Week 11"
subtitle: "Causal Inference"
---

## Prepare

📖 Watch the [videos](/teaching/ENCI707/prep/week11/week11-videos.html)

## Participate

🖥️ [Lecture 6 - Mode & Destination Choice](/teaching/CIVE461/slides/lec-6.html)

## Practice

✍️ [IA 1 - Choice Modeling](/teaching/CIVE461/assignments/indiv_assignment1.html) - Submit on Canvas

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/teaching/ENCI707/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
